description: Evidence-backed rapid deterioration replay: not slow KYC drift, but a multi-day liquidity and governance collapse before bankruptcy.
alarm_title: Binance says it will liquidate remaining FTT holdings tied to FTX after CoinDesk revelations

events.title: CoinDesk reports Alameda Research balance sheet heavily depends on FTX's FTT token
events.evidence: Leaked Alameda balance sheet shows dependency on FTT and raises solvency concerns.
events.extracted_fact: Alameda Research depende de los activos del token FTT de FTX en su balance sheet

events.title: Binance says it will liquidate remaining FTT holdings tied to FTX after CoinDesk revelations
events.evidence: Public counterparty action accelerates market pressure and begins a bank-run dynamic.
events.extracted_fact: Binance anunció que liquidará sus activos restantes de FTT relacionados con FTX tras revelaciones de CoinDesk

decision.triggering_event: Binance says it will liquidate remaining FTT holdings tied to FTX after CoinDesk revelations

description: Energy-payment exposure replay showing Gazprombank's sanctions risk rising despite initial exemptions.
alarm_title: Gazprombank becomes subject to EO 14024 Directive 3 restrictions on new debt and equity

events.title: Gazprombank is subject to Ukraine/Russia-related sectoral sanctions directives
events.evidence: Gazprombank appears under Ukraine/Russia-related sanctions directives as a Russian financial institution.
events.extracted_fact: La empresa fue sometida a directivas de sanciones sectoriales relacionadas con Ucrania/Rusia

events.title: Gazprombank becomes subject to EO 14024 Directive 3 restrictions on new debt and equity
events.evidence: Directive 3 restrictions apply to new debt/equity after effective date.
events.extracted_fact: La empresa se somete a restricciones de la Directiva 3 de la EO 14024 sobre nuevos préstamos y acciones

decision.triggering_event: Gazprombank becomes subject to EO 14024 Directive 3 restrictions on new debt and equity

description: Evidence-backed as-of replay showing gradual KYC drift from enterprise BI software toward a leveraged Bitcoin treasury strategy.
reference_model: Enterprise Business Intelligence software and cloud analytics.
alarm_title: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase

events.title: MicroStrategy announces capital allocation strategy: buyback plus alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin
events.evidence: Company says it may invest up to $250M in alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin.
events.extracted_fact: MicroStrategy anunció una estrategia de asignación de capital que incluye compras de acciones y activos alternativos, entre ellos activos digitales como el bitcoin

events.title: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase
events.evidence: Company purchases 21,454 bitcoins and states Bitcoin is now the principal holding in treasury reserve strategy.
events.extracted_fact: MicroStrategy adquiere Bitcoin como activo principal de reserva de tesorería con un monto de $250M

decision.triggering_event: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase

description: Chronological watchlist example: heavy commercial burn-in absorbs early regulatory hits so risk rises gradually without crossing the alarm threshold in this curated window. For Sequoia/FTX investor contagion use run_global_demo --companies FTX OpenAI.
reference_model: AI research lab monetising via API and subscriptions.

events.title: Italian privacy regulator orders temporary ban on OpenAI ChatGPT over unlawful data collection
events.evidence: Garante Privacy restricts ChatGPT processing in Italy, citing missing legal basis for training data collection.
events.extracted_fact: La autoridad de privacidad italiana ordena una prohibición temporal de ChatGPT por recopilación ilegal de datos.

events.title: ChatGPT returns to Italy after OpenAI implements privacy safeguards requested by regulator
events.evidence: OpenAI restores ChatGPT access in Italy after meeting regulator demands on transparency and age controls.
events.extracted_fact: La empresa implementó medidas de protección de privacidad solicitadas por la autoridad reguladora.

events.title: US FTC opens investigation into OpenAI over consumer harm, reputational risk and data practices
events.evidence: FTC sends a civil investigative demand on data security and risks of false or harmful statements about individuals.
events.extracted_fact: La FTC de EE.UU. inicia una investigación sobre prácticas de datos, riesgo reputacional y daño al consumidor

events.title: OpenAI board fires CEO Sam Altman; governance crisis begins
events.evidence: Board removes Altman; communication breakdown and board-control questions create governance risk.
events.extracted_fact: El consejo de administración de la empresa destituyó al CEO.

events.title: Nearly all OpenAI staff threaten to quit and join Microsoft unless board resigns
events.evidence: Staff revolt and Microsoft intervention reveal extreme governance fragility.
events.extracted_fact: El personal de la empresa amenaza con dejarla y unirse a otra empresa si el consejo de administración renuncia

events.title: New York Times sues OpenAI and Microsoft over copyrighted works used to train AI systems
events.evidence: Major copyright litigation seeks billions of dollars and destruction of infringing models/data.
events.extracted_fact: La empresa fue demandada por el New York Times por uso no autorizado de obras protegidas para entrenamiento de sistemas de inteligencia artificial

events.title: Former OpenAI board members accuse Altman of lying and call the governance experiment failed
events.evidence: Former board members publicly question governance and safety oversight.
events.extracted_fact: Antiguos miembros del consejo de MASKED_COMPANY_001 acusan a Altman de mentir y declaran que el experimento de gobernanza falló

events.title: US regulators clear antitrust probes into Microsoft OpenAI and Nvidia
events.evidence: DOJ and FTC divide antitrust work; FTC leads the Microsoft-OpenAI conduct review.
events.extracted_fact: Las autoridades estadounidenses han autorizado las investigaciones antimonopolio sobre Nvidia

events.title: Italian privacy regulator fines OpenAI €15M over EU data privacy breaches
events.evidence: Garante Privacy confirms material privacy enforcement with a €15M fine.
events.extracted_fact: La empresa fue sancionada con una multa de €15M por incumplimiento de normas de privacidad de datos en la UE

decision.triggering_event: Nearly all OpenAI staff threaten to quit and join Microsoft unless board resigns

description: Russian energy-sector escalation replay from sectoral controls to full US/UK oil-major designation.
reference_model: Vertically integrated Russian oil and gas producer.
alarm_title: EU refined oil products ban adds revenue pressure on Surgutneftegas and Russian energy sector

events.title: US sectoral restrictions target Russian oil companies including Surgutneftegas
events.evidence: OpenSanctions records US sanctions entries for Surgutneftegas starting 2014-09-12.
events.extracted_fact: La empresa fue sometida a restricciones sectoriales en el sector de petróleo por parte de Estados Unidos.

events.title: BIS Entity List restrictions apply to Surgutneftegas-linked Russian energy technology exposure
events.evidence: BIS Entity List entry appears in sanctions adjacency data.
events.extracted_fact: La empresa está sujeta a restricciones de la BIS Entity List debido a su exposición a tecnología energética rusa.

events.title: G7/EU oil price cap increases Surgutneftegas sanctions exposure for Russian oil exports
events.evidence: Oil price cap comes into effect to reduce Russia's ability to finance the war.
events.extracted_fact: La empresa enfrenta sanciones por exportar petróleo ruso bajo el precio máximo establecido por el G7/EU.

events.title: EU refined oil products ban adds revenue pressure on Surgutneftegas and Russian energy sector
events.evidence: Refined oil product restrictions add sectoral pressure to Russian oil producers.
events.extracted_fact: La prohibición de productos de aceite refinado en la UE genera presión sobre los ingresos de la empresa.

decision.triggering_event: EU refined oil products ban adds revenue pressure on Surgutneftegas and Russian energy sector

description: Sanctions escalation replay from 2014 sectoral restrictions to 2022 full blocking sanctions.
alarm_title: US announces full blocking sanctions on VTB, Russia's second largest financial institution

events.title: EU introduces targeted restrictive measures on Russian capital markets and sensitive sectors
events.source: Court of Justice / Council Decision 2014/512 context
events.evidence: Council Decision 2014/512 introduced sectoral restrictions after Russia's destabilisation of Ukraine.

events.title: VTB appears under EU sectoral restrictive measures linked to Russia's actions in Ukraine
events.evidence: VTB listing date under EU Russia sectoral restrictive measures.
events.extracted_fact: VTB fue incluido en medidas restrictivas sectoriales de la UE relacionadas con las acciones de Rusia en Ucrania

events.title: US issues new Russia-related blocking measures as Ukraine crisis escalates
events.evidence: New executive actions follow Russia's continued efforts to undermine Ukraine sovereignty.

events.title: US announces full blocking sanctions on VTB, Russia's second largest financial institution
events.evidence: Full blocking sanctions freeze VTB assets touching the US financial system.
events.extracted_fact: Estados Unidos impone sanciones completas contra VTB

decision.triggering_event: US announces full blocking sanctions on VTB, Russia's second largest financial institution

description: Evidence-backed replay showing accounting-risk drift before Wirecard's insolvency shock.
reference_model: Licensed payment processing and merchant acquiring.
alarm_title: FT reports suspicious transactions and alleged forged/backdated contracts in Wirecard's Singapore operations

events.title: Financial Times begins questioning inconsistencies in Wirecard's accounts
events.evidence: FT timeline records early investigative reporting questioning Wirecard's accounting years before insolvency.
events.extracted_fact: Financial Times inicia la revisión de inconsistencias en los estados financieros de Wirecard

events.title: FT reports suspicious transactions and alleged forged/backdated contracts in Wirecard's Singapore operations
events.evidence: Reuters timeline notes a January 2019 FT report on suspicious transactions and accounting-practice integrity.
events.extracted_fact: FT reporta transacciones sospechosas y contratos falsos/fechados en retroceso en las operaciones de Wirecard en Singapur

decision.triggering_event: FT reports suspicious transactions and alleged forged/backdated contracts in Wirecard's Singapore operations
